;; .succession/config.edn — Succession identity-cycle config
;;
;; Every tunable in the system lives here. Values are deep-merged
;; over the defaults in `succession.config/default-config`
;; so you only need to override the ones you disagree with.
;;
;; Reference: `.plans/succession-identity-cycle.md` §Config.

{:succession/config-version 1

 ;; --- Weight formula ---
 ;; freq = min(sqrt(distinct-sessions), freq-cap)
 ;; span = (1 + log(1+span_days))^span-exponent
 ;; gap  = 1 + gap-crossings
 ;; decay = 0.5 ^ (days_since_last / half-life)
 :weight/freq-cap                4.0
 :weight/span-exponent           1.5
 :weight/within-session-penalty  0.5
 :weight/decay-half-life-days    180
 :weight/violation-penalty-rate  0.5
 :weight/gap-threshold-sessions  1

 ;; --- Tier rules with hysteresis ---
 ;; enter: ALL conditions must hold; exit: ANY condition triggers.
 :tier/rules
 {:principle {:enter {:min-weight 30.0 :max-violation-rate 0.0 :min-gap-crossings 5}
              :exit  {:max-weight 20.0 :min-violation-rate 0.1}}
  :rule      {:enter {:min-weight 5.0  :max-violation-rate 0.3 :min-gap-crossings 1}
              :exit  {:max-weight 3.0  :min-violation-rate 0.5}}
  :ethic     {:enter {}                 ; default landing
              :exit  {:archive-below-weight 0.5}}}

 ;; --- Salience (PreToolUse / PostToolUse refresh ranking) ---
 :salience/profile
 {:feature-weights {:tier-weight 3.0 :tag-match 2.0 :fingerprint 4.0
                    :recency 0.5 :weight 1.0}
  :top-k    12}

 ;; --- Refresh gate (pacing filters, not budgets — see infinite-context principle) ---
 :refresh/gate
 {:integration-gap-turns 2
  :byte-threshold        200
  :cold-start-skip-turns 1}

 ;; --- Consult advisory reminder ---
 :consult/advisory
 {:every-n-turns              8
  :on-contradiction-adjacency true}

 ;; --- LLM models (deepseek primary, Sonnet fallback/escalation) ---
 :judge/llm     {:model "deepseek/deepseek-chat"
                 :fallback-model "claude-sonnet-4-6"
                 :timeout-seconds 30}
 :reconcile/llm {:model "claude-sonnet-4-6" :timeout-seconds 60
                 :auto-apply-confidence 0.8}
 :consult/llm   {:model "claude-sonnet-4-6" :timeout-seconds 60}

 ;; --- Escalation thresholds ---
 :escalation/sustained-violation {:min-rate 0.1 :min-sessions 3}
 :escalation/drift-alarm         {:contradictions-per-n-tool-calls 3
                                  :n-tool-calls 20}

 ;; --- Whitepaper §3.3.3 knowledge categories ---
 :card/categories [:strategy :failure-inheritance :relational-calibration :meta-cognition]

 ;; --- Auto-install starter cards on first session ---
 ;; Set to false to skip seeding the identity store on first auto-init.
 :auto-install/starter-pack true}
